title: Ofero.json Metadata Standard
description: Universal metadata format for organizations, businesses, and protocols. Provides structured information for AI/LLM consumption, partner integrations, merchant verification, and web3 entity metadata.
$comment: SECURITY REQUIREMENT: All URLs in this schema MUST use HTTPS protocol. HTTP URLs are explicitly disallowed for security, trust verification, and partnership integrity.

availableLanguages.description: List of language codes for which this organization provides translations. Translations are embedded inline using the TranslatableString structure (default + translations object) within the main ofero.json file.

domain.description: Base domain without protocol. Used for domain ownership verification. Must match the domain extracted from canonicalUrl.

canonicalUrl.description: Exact canonical URL where this ofero.json file is located. MUST be HTTPS and MUST end with '/ofero.json'. This URL must match exactly in all partnerships.oferoJson references for partnership verification.

partnerships.description: Verified partnerships with other organizations that also have ofero.json files

custom.description: Custom organization-specific fields not covered by the standard
custom.$comment: EXTENSIBILITY: Add any custom fields here. Popular custom fields may be promoted to the standard in future versions.

keywords.description: Keywords for AI search indexing and discovery. Use relevant terms that describe your organization, products, services, and industry (e.g., blockchain, fintech, web3, DeFi, NFT, etc.). Translatable per language.

nftCollections.description: NFT collections owned or operated by the organization

contractAddress.description: Smart contract address for the NFT collection

blockchain.description: Blockchain where the collection is deployed (e.g., 'ethereum', 'polygon', 'solana', 'multiversx')

standard.description: NFT standard: ERC-721 (Ethereum NFT), ERC-1155 (Multi-token), ESDT-NFT (MultiversX), SPL (Solana), other

totalSupply.description: Total supply of NFTs in the collection

marketplaceUrl.description: URL to the collection on marketplace (OpenSea, Magic Eden, etc.)

explorerUrl.description: URL to view the collection on blockchain explorer

locations.description: Must contain at least one location when hqLocationId is specified in organization

TranslatableString.description: Multi-language translations object with default value and language-specific translations

default.description: Default language version (typically matches the root 'language' field)

legalName.description: Official legal name of the organization

foundedDate.description: Date when the organization was founded (ISO 8601 format)

hqLocationId.description: Reference to the headquarters location ID in the locations array. MUST match an existing location id.

legalForm.description: Legal form (e.g., LLC, SA, GmbH, Ltd, 501(c)(3)) - see ofero-json-legal-forms.json for standard values

description.description: Description of the organization's activities and purpose

tagline.description: One-sentence elevator pitch/tagline (max 160 characters). This is the #1 most important field for AI summaries, search results, and partnership tables.

socialActivityDomain.description: Domain of social activity (for associations/NGOs only)

nonProfitStatus.description: Whether the organization has non-profit status (for associations/NGOs)

contactPhone.description: Primary contact phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890, +40722333444). Pattern: + followed by 1-15 digits, first digit cannot be 0.

primary.description: Whether this is a primary additional website

eori.description: Economic Operators Registration and Identification (EORI) number (EU)

specialHours.description: Special or holiday hours that override the regular businessHours schedule. Each entry applies to a specific date or date range.

phone.description: Direct phone number for this location (e.g., "+14155551234")

email.description: Direct email address for this location

amenities.description: Facilities and features available at this location. Use standard values where possible; custom strings are accepted.

paymentMethods.description: Payment methods accepted at this location.

photos.description: Photos of this location (storefronts, interiors, etc.)

items.description: HTTPS URL of a location photo

PaymentMethod.description: A payment method accepted at a location. Use 'type' for the category and 'providers' for specific brands or networks.

type.description: Payment method category. 'card' covers debit/credit cards; 'meal-voucher' covers food/lunch vouchers (providers vary by country); 'mobile-payment' covers NFC/QR-based wallets; 'other' for anything not listed.

providers.description: Specific brands, networks, or tokens accepted. Well-known values per type — card: visa, mastercard, amex, discover, unionpay, jcb, diners. crypto: btc, eth, usdc, usdt, sol, bnb, xrp, matic. mobile-payment: apple-pay, google-pay, samsung-pay. meal-voucher and gift-card providers vary by country — use local provider names as strings.

notes.description: Optional notes (e.g., 'minimum 10 USD for card', 'crypto via QR at cashier')

SpecialHoursEntry.description: A single special/holiday hours entry that overrides regular business hours for a specific date or date range. Use 'date' for a single day (e.g., a public holiday), or 'from'+'to' for a period (e.g., summer schedule, holiday season).

date.description: Specific date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Mutually exclusive with 'from'/'to'.

name.description: Human-readable label for this special period (e.g., 'Christmas Day', 'New Year', 'Summer Schedule').

hours.description: Opening hours for this period in HH:MM-HH:MM format, or 'Closed' if the location is closed.

from.description: Start date of the special period in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Mutually exclusive with 'date'.

to.description: End date of the special period in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Mutually exclusive with 'date'.

name.description: Human-readable label for this special period (e.g., 'Christmas Day', 'New Year', 'Summer Schedule').

hours.description: Opening hours for this period in HH:MM-HH:MM format, or 'Closed' if the location is closed.

BusinessHours.description: Business hours for each day of the week (format: HH:MM-HH:MM or 'Closed')

phone.description: Contact phone number in E.164 format

public.description: Whether this contact information is publicly accessible

photo.description: Profile photo URL of the contact person (HTTPS, recommended aspect ratio 3:4)

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., EUR, USD, GBP)

accountNumber.description: Bank account number (if IBAN not applicable)

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where the account is held

label.description: Human-readable label for this wallet (e.g., 'Ofero Treasury 1', 'Staking Rewards')

blockchain.description: Blockchain name (e.g., multiversx, ethereum, bitcoin, solana)

purpose.description: Purpose of this wallet (e.g., treasury, staking-rewards, operations, donations)

dex.description: Decentralized exchange where liquidity is provided

network.description: Network where the feed is available

brandingKeywords.description: Brand keywords for search and AI indexing

Logos.description: Organization logos in multiple formats and variants. Recommended: Provide both square (1:1) and horizontal (wide) logo variants for maximum portal compatibility. Mark one logo as 'primary' to indicate the preferred/default logo.

vector.description: Vector logo files (SVG, PDF). Recommended formats: square (512x512) and horizontal (600x60). File size: max 512KB.

raster.description: Raster logo files (PNG, JPEG, JPG). Recommended formats: square (512x512 to 1024x1024) and horizontal (600x60 to 1200x628). File size: max 512KB.

primary.description: Mark this logo as the primary/default logo. Only one logo should be marked as primary. Portals will prefer this logo when displaying the organization.

aspectRatio.description: Logo aspect ratio: 'square' (1:1) for dashboards/avatars, 'horizontal' (wide) for headers/banners, 'vertical' (tall) for specialized layouts

logoType.description: Logo composition: 'full' (icon+text), 'icon-only' (symbol/mark without text), 'text-only' (text/wordmark only), 'symbol' (abstract symbol), 'wordmark' (stylized text)

colorVariant.description: Color variant: 'color' (full color), 'light' (for dark backgrounds), 'dark' (for light backgrounds), 'monochrome' (single color), 'grayscale', 'white', 'black'

alt.description: Alternative text description for accessibility (e.g., 'Oferome logo', 'Acme Corp symbol')

license.description: License or usage terms for this logo

brandBook.description: URL to brand guidelines or brand book PDF

Catalog.description: Product and service catalog. For large catalogs, use productFeeds/serviceFeeds to link external feeds. For small businesses (restaurants, service providers), use inline items/menu/services arrays directly.

productFeeds.description: Product feed URLs for large catalogs

serviceFeeds.description: Service feed URLs for large catalogs

menu.description: Restaurant/food service menu with categories. Ideal for restaurants, cafes, bars.

categories.description: Menu categories (e.g., Appetizers, Main Course, Desserts, Drinks)

dailyMenu.description: Daily specials or weekly rotating menu. Items may differ in portion size, price, or composition from the regular menu.

weekOf.description: The Monday date of the week this daily menu applies to (YYYY-MM-DD)

note.description: Optional note about the daily menu (e.g., 'Menu changes every Monday')

schedule.description: Daily specials indexed by day of the week

services.description: Service offerings with pricing. Ideal for service businesses (auto repair, salons, professional services).

packages.description: Service packages or bundles with pricing. Ideal for karting, experiences, memberships.

portfolio.description: Portfolio items for creative businesses (architecture, photography, modeling).

priceListUrl.description: URL to full price list PDF or page

serviceHours.description: Hours when this category is served (e.g., '08:00-12:00'). Omit if available all day.

priceFormatted.description: Formatted price with currency symbol (e.g., '35 RON', '$12.99')

DailyMenuItem.description: A single item in the daily menu. Standalone definition — may differ from regular menu items in portion size, price, or composition.

priceFormatted.description: Formatted price with currency symbol (e.g., '35 RON', '$12.99')

available.description: Whether this item is available today

RestaurantDetails.description: Restaurant-specific details: seating capacity, service types, reservation and ordering information. Use alongside catalog.menu for full restaurant metadata.

privateRooms.description: Private dining rooms or event spaces

capacity.description: Maximum seating capacity of this room

available.description: Whether this room can be booked

bookingUrl.description: Direct booking URL for this room

deliveryPlatforms.description: Third-party delivery platforms (Glovo, Bolt Food, Tazz, Uber Eats etc.)

url.description: Restaurant page URL on this platform

active.description: Whether currently active on this platform

required.description: Whether reservations are required (vs. walk-in accepted)

advanceNotice.description: How far in advance reservations should be made (e.g., '24h', '48h', '1 week')

maxGroupSize.description: Maximum group size for a single reservation

notes.description: Additional parking info (e.g., 'Parking in the mall, first 2h free')

priceRange.description: Price range indicator: $ = budget, $$ = moderate, $$$ = upscale, $$$$ = fine dining

averageCheckPerPerson.description: Average check per person in default currency

michelinStars.description: Number of Michelin stars (0 if none)

ratingsUrl.description: URL to your Google Business Profile, TripAdvisor page, or other primary ratings page. Do not embed rating scores here — they change frequently and would become stale.

AccommodationDetails.description: Hotel and accommodation metadata. Contains static property-level information only. For room types, rates, and availability use industry standards: OTA (OpenTravel Alliance) XML, Schema.org HotelRoom JSON-LD, or your channel manager feed — link to those via the reference fields below.

bookingUrl.description: Direct booking URL on your website

ratingsUrl.description: Link to your Booking.com, TripAdvisor, or Google ratings page. Do not embed scores — they change frequently.

schemaOrgUrl.description: URL to your Schema.org JSON-LD file (LodgingBusiness / HotelRoom markup). Used by Google Hotels and search engines for rich results.

otaFeedUrl.description: OTA (OpenTravel Alliance) XML feed URL for room types, rates and availability. This is the standard used by Booking.com, Expedia and channel managers. See opentravel.org for specification.

channelManagerId.description: Your property ID in the channel manager system (SiteMinder, Myallocator, etc.)

ServicePackage.description: A service package or bundle (ideal for karting, experiences, subscriptions)

ageRequirement.description: Age requirement (e.g., '16+', '18+ for adults, 8+ for kids')

PortfolioItem.description: A portfolio item for creative businesses

url.description: URL to product or service page

type.description: Type of certificate (e.g., ISO-9001, GDPR-Compliance, SOC2)

certificateUrl.description: URL to certificate document or verification page

WebsiteManager.description: Information about the website manager, owner, or operator. This can be a company, agency, or individual freelancer responsible for managing the website or ofero.json file. All fields are optional.

name.description: Company name or individual's full name

phone.description: Contact phone number in E.164 format

address.description: One-line address (e.g., '123 Main St, City, Country')

DefaultAccount.description: Default account information for the organization. This can be used to pre-fill forms on partner websites, provide default contact details, or represent the primary business account. Useful for B2B integrations, merchant onboarding, and automated form filling. All fields are optional.

email.description: Default contact email address for business communications

firstName.description: First name of the default contact person

lastName.description: Last name of the default contact person

companyName.description: Company or organization name (can differ from legalName, e.g., DBA name)

addressOneLine.description: One-line address format (e.g., '123 Main St, City, State, ZIP, Country')

phone.description: Default contact phone number in E.164 format

mobile.description: Mobile phone number in E.164 format (optional)

fax.description: Fax number in E.164 format (if applicable)

logoUrl.description: URL to the company logo (recommended: square, PNG format, 512x512px or higher)

logoThumbUrl.description: URL to thumbnail version of the logo (recommended: 128x128px)

currency.description: Preferred currency (ISO 4217 code, e.g., EUR, USD, RON)

category.description: Distribution category (e.g., team, community, liquidity, seed, private, public)

allocation.description: Percentage of total supply allocated to this category (0-100)

type.description: Token standard (e.g., ESDT, ERC-20, BEP-20, SPL)

totalSupply.description: Total token supply (as string to handle large numbers)

contractAddresses.description: Contract addresses by purpose (e.g., main, staking, rewards)

explorerUrl.description: Block explorer URL for this token

availability.description: Real-time availability API endpoint. For restaurants: current occupancy, table availability, wait time. For hotels: room availability. For any venue: live capacity data. Expected to return JSON with current status.

reservations.description: Reservations/booking API endpoint. Used for programmatic booking integrations.

publicDataFeeds.description: Public data feeds in standard formats. Use this to point to operational/live data (timetables, course catalogs, open datasets) in established standards rather than embedding them inline. Ideal for public transport operators (GTFS), universities (iCal, JSON-LD), government entities (open-data portals), and any organization publishing structured public data.

name.description: Human-readable name for this feed (e.g., 'Bus Timetables', 'Course Catalog 2025-2026', 'Open Spending Data')

format.description: Data format: gtfs (General Transit Feed Specification), gtfs-realtime (live transit updates), ical (calendar events/courses - RFC 5545), json-ld (structured linked data), csv, xml, geojson (geographic data), atom/rss (news/updates), open-data (generic open data portal), sparql (semantic web endpoint), wfs/wms (geospatial web services), other

url.description: URL to the data feed or endpoint

description.description: Optional description of what this feed contains

updateFrequency.description: How often the feed is updated (e.g., 'realtime', 'daily', 'weekly', 'per-semester')

language.description: Primary language of the data content (ISO 639-1 code)

validFrom.description: Date from which this feed is valid (ISO 8601)

validTo.description: Date until which this feed is valid (ISO 8601)

Partnership.description: Partnership with another organization. IMPORTANT: For a partnership to be considered 'verified', both organizations must list each other in their respective ofero.json files. One-sided partnership declarations will be marked as 'pending-verification' or 'unreciprocated-invalid'. The oferoJson URL must EXACTLY match the partner's canonicalUrl field.
Partnership.$comment: VALIDATION: Automated validators should check reciprocity by fetching the partner's ofero.json, verifying mutual listing, and ensuring the oferoJson URL matches the partner's canonicalUrl field exactly.

oferoJson.description: URL to partner's ofero.json file. IMPORTANT: This URL must exactly match the value in the partner's canonicalUrl field for the partnership to be considered valid.

status.description: 'pending-verification' = not yet checked (default), 'verified' = reciprocal partnership confirmed (validators should auto-upgrade when both parties list each other), 'unreciprocated-invalid' = partner does not list you back or URLs don't match

jobsUrl.description: Careers page or job board URL

securityAudits.description: Security audits conducted by third-party auditors

reportUrl.description: URL to the public audit report

criticalFindingsResolved.description: Whether all critical findings have been resolved

bugBounty.description: Bug bounty program information for responsible disclosure and security researcher rewards

url.description: Direct link to active bug bounty page or program details

maxRewardUsd.description: Highest reward in USD (e.g., 1000000 for $1M max bounty)

inScope.description: Short list of in-scope assets (e.g., 'smart contracts', 'web app', 'mobile app', 'API')

SocialMedia.description: Public social media profile URLs for user navigation and community engagement. Contains full clickable URLs. For platform-specific account IDs used in B2B integrations, use 'platformAccounts' instead.

portal.description: Support portal or help center URL

phone.description: Support phone number in E.164 format

preferredSources.description: Preferred source URLs for AI to prioritize

contentNotes.description: Notes for AI systems about content interpretation

allow.description: Allow AI indexing of this metadata

allowTraining.description: Allow using this data for AI model training

votingUrl.description: Governance voting interface URL (e.g., Snapshot, custom governance app)

Resources.description: Documentation and content resources for LLMs and developers

knowledgeBase.description: URL to primary knowledge base or help center

maxRate.description: Maximum reward rate (in percentage, if applicable)

Metadata.description: File metadata including versioning, timestamps, and update information

version.description: Semantic version of this ofero.json file (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). Increment when content changes.

schemaVersion.description: ofero.json schema version identifier - always 'ofero-metadata-1.0' for this schema version

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this file was created (ISO 8601 format)

createdBy.description: Tool, author or system that created this file (e.g., 'ofero-cli/1.2.0', 'manual/1.0', 'api-v2/2.1.3')

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when this file was last updated (ISO 8601 format)

updatedBy.description: Tool, author or system that last updated this file

updateFrequency.description: Expected update frequency for this file - helps platforms know how often to re-crawl

changelogUrl.description: Link to changelog file documenting version history

BusinessClassification.description: Business classification and industry categorization for merchant verification and partnership discovery

industry.description: Hierarchical industry taxonomy using values from ofero-json-industries.json. Order from general to specific (e.g., ['food-service', 'restaurant', 'fast-food'])

mccCode.description: Merchant Category Code - 4 digits used by payment processors (Visa, Mastercard, etc.)

naicsCode.description: North American Industry Classification System code - 6 digits (US/Canada/Mexico standard)

sicCode.description: Standard Industrial Classification code - 4 digits (legacy US standard)

primaryProducts.description: Main products or services offered (free-form descriptions)

targetMarket.description: Target market segments - at least one required

operationalStatus.description: Current operational status: active (operating), suspended (temporarily not operating), closed (permanently closed), pending (pending approval/launch)

PlatformAccounts.description: Platform-specific business accounts and identifiers for B2B integrations and merchant onboarding. Contains structured IDs (pageId, businessId, etc.) rather than URLs. For public social media URLs, use 'communications.social' instead. Self-reported only, no verification required. Use lowercase platform names as keys.
PlatformAccounts.$comment: Extensible object - supports any platform. Common platforms: facebook, google, x, linkedin, instagram, tiktok, youtube

businessProfileId.description: Google Business Profile ID (formerly Google My Business)

dataClassification.description: Data classification level: 'public' (freely shareable), 'internal' (organization only), 'confidential' (need-to-know), 'restricted' (highest security)

gdprCompliance.description: Whether the organization is GDPR compliant

dataRetentionPeriod.description: Data retention period in ISO 8601 duration format (e.g., 'P1Y' for 1 year, 'P30D' for 30 days, 'P6M' for 6 months)

stars.description: Number of stars/likes (optional, for popularity indication)

CoverImage.description: Cover/header image for the organization profile. Recommended size: 1200x628px (Open Graph standard). Used by portals, social previews, and listing pages.

url.description: URL to the cover image file

alt.description: Alternative text description for accessibility (e.g., "Bella Pizzeria restaurant interior")
